name: Really Trash Game
short_description: The Mafia wages war on you! Cut your way through cohorts of gangs and dirty cops in this bloody battle. Grab the guns, use the med kits to heal your wounds, and try to survive.
detailed_description:
This shoot`em`up game will be a decent challenge for you. Go through pack of levels, grabbing weapons, and shooting your way through them. The ammo is scarce, enemies is everywhere, and surrounding vehicles needs just a little sparks to blown up, killing you and all who will be near.

Features:
* Classic gameplay.
* Swarm of enemies.
* Destroyable vehicles.
* Scarce ammo, so be careful recharging your weapons.
* Stylish lo-poly graphics.
* Dynamic music.
* 9 levels.
